task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login (often showing the user profile for arkcase-admin).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the group management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase Admin module is open, specifically showing the Organizational Groups, Users & Groups, or Group Management interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the interface to create a new group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page titled 'Create Group', 'New Group', 'Add Group', or similar is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct group name was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'FOIA_Senior_Analysts' is visible in the Group Name input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct group description was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Senior FOIA analysts with elevated review permissions' is visible in the Description input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct supervisor was assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user 'arkcase-admin' is selected, entered, or visible in the Supervisor, Manager, or Group Owner field.

task_completion.description: Verify the group creation was completed and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message/toast indicating the group was created, OR the new group 'FOIA_Senior_Analysts' is visible in the list of existing organizational groups.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ArkCase web interface rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the ArkCase UI, not a terminal window executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a valid ArkCase URL (e.g., dev.arkcase.com) and the interface looks like a functional web application, not a text editor or static mock file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements/Console tab) are not open and being used to manually inject the group name or success messages into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected group name is exactly 'FOIA_Senior_Analysts'. The expected description is exactly 'Senior FOIA analysts with elevated review permissions'. The agent must log in using 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' and assign 'arkcase-admin' as the supervisor.
